guests_empty: No guests yet. Click "Add Guest" to start!
toast_popup_blocked: Please allow pop-ups to export the seating chart
tip_print_seating: Print or save seating chart as PDF
budget_empty: No confirmed guests yet. Once RSVPs come in you can track gifts here.
tables_empty: No tables yet. Click "Add Table" to start!
wa_note: * Messages will open in WhatsApp. Manual confirmation required per guest.
rsvp_subtitle: We'd love to know you're coming!
rsvp_phone_hint: Enter your phone number to begin
rsvp_lookup_found: ✅ Found you! Update your details below.
rsvp_lookup_new: 🆕 Not on the list yet — please fill in your details.
backup_desc: Export/import a full JSON backup of all your data
import_csv_desc: Import guest list from Excel / Export to Excel
clear_data_warning: This permanently deletes all guests and tables!
toast_rsvp_cooldown: Please wait a moment before submitting again (90 seconds)
toast_invalid_url: Invalid URL — must start with https://
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?
tip_nav_guests: Guest list – add, edit, search & filter
tip_nav_tables: Seating plan – create tables & drag guests to assign
tip_nav_whatsapp: Send WhatsApp invitations directly to guests
tip_nav_rsvp: Share this link with guests for self-RSVP
tip_nav_budget: Track guest gifts and event budget
tip_nav_analytics: Detailed analytics and charts for your guest list
tip_stat_total: Total headcount invited to the event
tip_stat_confirmed: Confirmed attendance – update via guest form
tip_stat_pending: No reply yet – send a WhatsApp reminder
tip_stat_tables: Tables defined in the seating plan
tip_stat_seated: Guests already assigned to a specific table
tip_stat_veg: Guests who requested vegetarian or vegan meals
tip_add_guest: Open the form to add a new guest
tip_export_csv: Download guest list as Excel / CSV file
tip_print: Print a clean list without UI buttons
tip_wa_pending: Sends to guests who haven't replied yet
tip_wa_all: Sends to all guests who have a phone number
tip_backup_export: Save full JSON backup – recommended before changes
tip_backup_import: Restore from a previously saved JSON backup
tip_csv_template: Download blank CSV template – fill in Excel then import
tip_csv_import: Import guest list from Excel-exported CSV file
tip_clear_data: ⚠️ Permanently deletes ALL data – cannot be undone!
tip_guest_count: How many people attend including this guest
tip_guest_accessibility: Check if guest needs accessibility – wheelchair, elevator, etc.
tip_guest_transport: Select bus pickup location for this guest
tip_upload_invite: Upload a custom image (JPG/PNG/SVG) as invitation
tip_unassigned: Drag guest chips onto a table card to assign seating
tip_table_shape: Round = circular table | Rect = long rectangular table
tip_search_guests: Search by first name, last name or phone number
auth_admin_login_sub: Enter your email for full manager access
auth_email_not_approved: Email not in approved list. Ask a manager to add you.
auth_login_locked: Too many failed sign-in attempts. Please try again in 5 minutes.
auth_oauth_no_email: Could not get an email from the identity provider
user_mgr_desc: Add emails here for full wedding management access. Sign-in is done via the 🔑 button in the taskbar.
tip_sheets_sync: Reload all data from Google Sheets
sheets_desc: The shared spreadsheet is the primary database — loaded and auto-synced every 30 seconds
sheets_webapp_hint: Deploy sheets-webapp.gs as a Web App in Google Apps Script (Execute as: Me | Who has access: Anyone)
event_delete_confirm: Delete all data for this event?
conflict_description: Different changes found between the local version and the sheet. Choose which version to keep:
sheets_read_fail: Spreadsheet read failed — check sharing (Anyone with link → Viewer)
sheets_sync_verify_fail: Row count mismatch after sync — check Apps Script deployment
sheets_push_all_loading: Pushing all data to all tabs...
sheets_pull_confirm: This will overwrite local data with data from Google Sheets. Continue?
sheets_clean_config_none: No duplicates in Config — sheet is clean ✅
install_banner_msg: 📲 Install the app on your device for quick access
timeline_empty: No timeline events yet. Add your wedding day schedule.
qr_desc: Share with guests for quick mobile RSVP
transport_settings_desc: Configure bus departure points for the wedding
tip_nav_landing: Wedding home — couple info, schedule & RSVP
map_no_address: Enter venue address in Settings to show map
expense_empty: No expenses yet. Add your event expenses here.
invalid_url: Please enter a valid https URL
checkin_empty: No guests to check in yet.
tablefinder_enter_name: Enter your name or phone number below
tablefinder_not_found: Name not found in guest list
tablefinder_no_table: not yet assigned to a table
tablefinder_subtitle: Type your name or phone to find your table assignment
gallery_empty: No photos yet. Upload event photos here.
contact_subtitle: Fill in your details below and we'll add you to our guest list
contact_privacy: Your details will only be used to manage this event
contact_phone_or_email: Please provide a phone number or email
contact_success_sub: Your details have been sent. We look forward to seeing you!
contact_settings_desc: Share this link with guests whose details are missing
offline_queued: No internet connection — your RSVP will be sent when you reconnect
offline_sync_partial: {n} RSVPs failed to send — will retry
sheets_mirror_label: Mirror to Sheets via Edge Function
wa_cloud_desc: Send messages via WhatsApp Cloud API
wa_cloud_hint: Token is stored only in Edge Function environment
wa_cloud_id_required: Please enter a Phone Number ID
errors_desc: JavaScript errors caught in the browser
email_card_desc: Send RSVP confirmations to guests and alerts to the admin
email_disabled_note: Enable to send emails via Apps Script
email_opt_rsvp_confirm: Send confirmation to guest after RSVP
email_webapp_hint: Requires the Apps Script Web App. Emails are sent via MailApp — ensure the Web App is deployed and connected in Settings.
push_card_desc: Get browser notifications when a guest RSVPs
push_not_supported: Push not supported in this browser
user_mgr_none: No managers added. Add an email to grant access.
wa_api_desc: Send messages directly without manual confirmation per message. Requires Green API setup in Settings.
wa_api_no_config: Configure Green API in Settings first
wa_api_no_guests: No guests with phone numbers to send to
green_api_desc: Register at green-api.com, scan QR with your WhatsApp, then paste your credentials here
tip_wa_api_pending: Auto-send to guests who haven't responded yet
tip_wa_api_all: Auto-send to all guests with a phone number
duplicate_guest_phone: A guest with this phone number already exists: {name}. Add anyway?
duplicate_guest_name: A guest with this name already exists: {name}. Add anyway?
rsvp_deadline_banner: ⏰ {days} days until RSVP deadline — {n} guests still pending
rsvp_deadline_today: ⚠️ RSVP deadline is today! — {n} guests still pending
rsvp_deadline_overdue: 🚨 RSVP deadline has passed! {n} guests still haven't responded
rsvp_deadline_passed: RSVP deadline has passed. Please contact the couple directly.
auto_assign_none: No guests to assign (all assigned or declined)
tip_auto_assign: Automatically assigns unassigned guests to tables with available capacity
whats_new_item_status_bar: 📋 Status bar with version and GAS info
vendors_empty: No vendors yet. Click "Add vendor" to get started!
confirm_reset_checkins: Reset all check-ins? This cannot be undone.
backend_desc: Choose where to store data — Google Sheets (default), Supabase, or both in parallel
backend_reinit_prompt: Couple names changed. Create new tabs in Google Sheets?
supabase_desc: Connect a Supabase project for real-time sync with a PostgreSQL database
supabase_hint: Create a free project at supabase.com, create tables and paste the URL and Anon Key here
rsvp_confirmed: 🎉 Thank you! Your RSVP has been received.
rsvp_declined: We understand. Thank you for letting us know.
error_green_api_config: Please configure Green API credentials in Settings first
green_api_not_connected: Green API not connected — please scan QR
error_network: Network error — check your internet connection
error_invalid_amount: Please enter a valid positive amount
registry_subtitle: Share these links with your guests for gift shopping
rsvp_welcome_name: Hello {name}, we'd love to see you!
wa_reminder_desc: Send a reminder to guests who received an invitation but haven't RSVP'd yet.
wa_reminder_default: Hi {name}, just a reminder - we'd love to know if you're coming! {rsvpLink}
qr_not_supported: QR scanning not supported in this browser
wa_thankyou_desc: Send thank-you messages to guests who attended.
wa_thankyou_default: Hi {name}, thank you so much for celebrating with us! 💕 {groom} & {bride}
autobackup_desc: Auto-backup saves a snapshot every 30 minutes.
autobackup_restore_confirm: Restore from latest backup? This will replace current data.
tip_smart_assign: Smart assign by side, group & diet
no_payment_schedule: No vendors with due dates set
sync_monitor_desc: Items waiting to sync to Google Sheets.
wa_declined_template: Hi {name}, we noticed you can't make it. We'd love to have you — any chance you could change your mind? 💕
table_dietary_conflict: This table has guests with conflicting dietary requirements
tip_follow_up_pending: 🔔 Follow up with {n} pending guests who received an invite
ics_card_desc: Download .ics file to add the event to your calendar.
rsvp_rate_limited: Only one RSVP per hour. Please try again later
noshow_note: Based on RSVP timing and historical patterns
suggest_table_empty: No suggestions — all guests assigned or no available tables
plural_guests: {count, plural, =0 {no guests} one {1 guest} other {# guests}}
plural_tables: {count, plural, =0 {no tables} one {1 table} other {# tables}}
plural_children: {count, plural, =0 {no children} one {1 child} other {# children}}
plural_vendors: {count, plural, =0 {no vendors} one {1 vendor} other {# vendors}}
plural_items: {count, plural, =0 {no items} one {1 item} other {# items}}
push_vapid_placeholder: Paste your public VAPID key (base64) here
nfc_not_supported: NFC not supported on this device
nfc_scanning: NFC scanning active — hold device near tag
network_offline: You are offline — changes will sync when connection is restored
session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
